chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 1/8: Order on the App
scene: 晚上你用外卖 App 点餐。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.cn: 这家有满三十减五，凑一下？
turns.en: This place has five off thirty. Want to hit the minimum?
Add spring rolls and we're good. I'll pay.

turns.cn: 地址还是咱家吧？门牌写清楚。
turns.en: Same address? Make sure the unit number is clear.

turns.cn: 写了 3B，备注放门口别按铃，孩子在睡。
turns.en: Unit 3B. Note says leave at door, don't ring—kid's asleep.
Forty minutes estimated. Sounds good.

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 2/8: Track the Order
scene: 下单后你在 App 上看配送进度。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.en: Restaurant accepted. They're cooking now.
Has a driver picked it up yet?

turns.cn: 还没，显示预计三十五分钟到。
turns.en: Not yet. Shows thirty-five minutes ETA.
We can complain if it's late, right?
Yeah. Let's wait and see.

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 3/8: Driver Calls
scene: 骑手打电话说找不到楼。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.cn: 您好，外卖到了，3B 在哪？
turns.en: Hi, delivery here. Where's unit 3B?

turns.cn: 进大门左转，三楼右手边。
turns.en: Left after the main door, third floor on the right.
What's the gate code?
Press two-five-eight-zero, then the buzzer.
Got it. Be right at your door.
Thanks. Just leave it at the door.

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 4/8: Receive the Food
scene: 你开门取外卖。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.en: Your order. Please confirm.
Thanks. Is the bag sealed?

turns.cn: 封好了，饮料单独袋子里。
turns.en: Yes. Drinks are in a separate bag.

turns.cn: 好，小费在 App 里给了。
turns.en: Great. I tipped in the app.
Thank you. Enjoy!

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 5/8: Wrong Item
scene: 打开发现少了一份饭，你联系客服。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.en: Support here. What's the issue?

turns.cn: 订单里两份炒饭只收到一份。
turns.en: We ordered two fried rice but only got one.

turns.cn: 抱歉，我查一下……确实漏了，补送还是退款？
turns.en: Sorry. Let me check… You're right. Redeliver or refund?
Redeliver, please. We're still waiting to eat.

turns.cn: 好的，二十分钟到，送您优惠券。
turns.en: Okay. Twenty minutes. We'll add a coupon for you.
Thank you.

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 6/8: Rate the Order
scene: 吃完后你在 App 上评价。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.cn: 味道不错，给骑手五星吧。
turns.en: Food was good. Five stars for the driver?

turns.cn: 行，虽然晚了几分钟但态度好。
turns.en: Sure. A few minutes late but they were polite.
Four stars for the restaurant. Soup was salty.
I'll write soup was salty, otherwise satisfied.
We'll try a different place next time.

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 7/8: Grocery Delivery
scene: 你订了超市生鲜配送，配送员到了。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.cn: 生鲜配送，三袋，有冷冻品请尽快放冰箱。
turns.en: Grocery delivery. Three bags. Please refrigerate frozen items soon.
Okay. Are the eggs intact?

turns.cn: 我小心放的，您检查一下。
turns.en: I packed them carefully. Please check.
All good. Thank you.
Leave bags for pickup at the door if you'd like.

chain.title: Food Delivery from Order to Door

title: Chain 8/8: Subscribe for Regular Delivery
scene: 你觉得牛奶配送方便，咨询定期送。（对话链：外卖配送）

turns.en: Can I get milk delivered every week?

turns.cn: 可以，选订阅每周一早上送。
turns.en: Yes. Subscribe for Monday morning delivery.
Can I pause anytime?

turns.cn: 提前一天在 App 里改就行。
turns.en: Change it in the app one day ahead.
Okay. I'll try two weeks.
All set. First delivery is tomorrow.
